functions.name: NAV
functions.description: Returns the latest NAV value for a mutual fund scheme.

functions.name: NAV_DATE
functions.description: Returns the date of the latest NAV as DD-MM-YYYY.

functions.name: NAV_ON
functions.description: Returns the NAV for a scheme on a specific date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in DD-MM-YYYY format, or a date-formatted cell

functions.name: NAME
functions.description: Returns the scheme name for a given scheme code.

functions.name: FUND_HOUSE
functions.description: Returns the fund house (AMC) name for a given scheme code.
